items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Intel agencies Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expecte
id: 1dee2520-35ba-570c-a5c4-61038d86917d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/23
modified: 2026/06/23
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T03:39:22Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8011198; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: No external corroboration; unverified intelligence
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items.exec_summary: Intel agencies: Frontier AI models will reshape cybersecurity faster than expected. Risk score: 5.0/10. NVD status: UNVERIFIED. Detection rules available (Sigma/KQL).

items.title: Microsofts New Option Allows Organizations to Block Copilot Access to Office Files
items.description:
Microsoft has announced a significant update to its Microsoft 365 security and compliance features, introducing enhanced controls that allow organizations to block Copilot and other connected experiences from analyzing content in Office files. items.title: Webshells Remain Popular, (Mon, Jun 22nd)
items.description: Webshells have been popular for a long time. We already covered this topic across multiple diaries[ 1 ][ 2 ]. I spent some time to track them[ 3 ] and slighly paid less attention to them but today I found another one. It seems to be a new player (pushed on Github two months ago).

items.title: Suspected cyberattack triggers false emergency alerts across parts of Brazil

id: 1b7c73bb-bd42-5bac-a0ed-f87bf8c0c4a4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:

    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/23
modified: 2026/06/23
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T03:39:22Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX New OXLOADER Loader Uses Malicious Google Ads to Deliver CastleStealer Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7928500; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: No external corroboration; unverified intelligence
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window

items.title: 23 ClawHub plugins squatting official scopes expose AI registry security gaps
items.description: Plugin registries for AI agents use npm-style scopes like @openclaw/ and @clawhub/ to signal who published a package. items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Low Remote Code Execution CVE-2026-12866
id: 08508a82-ce59-5512-be5c-4a89fd54ad28
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12866 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12866
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/23
modified: 2026/06/23
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12866 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T06:13:51Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-12866", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12866 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6261194; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: Single source with minimal corroborating evidence
items.recommended_sla_action: MONITOR — Assess in next vulnerability review cycle
items.exec_summary: CVE-2026-12866 is a low-severity vulnerability. Risk score: 1.0/10. NVD status: PRELIMINARY. Detection rules available (Sigma/KQL).

items.title: Apple Beats Studio Buds Vulnerability Allows Hackers to Eavesdrop on Users
items.description:
